⚔ Credits & Licenses

RobinHood Idle is built on wonderful open art. Please respect the licenses below.

Character & enemy art
Universal LPC Spritesheet — the Liberated Pixel Cup contributors.
Gang & NPC gear: kettle/bascinet helmets, crossbow, heater shield, hood, chainmail — all LPC (CC-BY-SA 3.0 / GPL 3.0).
Authors: bluecarrot16, JaidynReiman, Benjamin K. Smith (BenCreating), Evert, Eliza Wyatt (ElizaWy), TheraHedwig, MuffinElZangano, Durrani, Johannes Sjölund (wulax), Stephen Challener (Redshrike), Matthew Krohn (makrohn), Manuel Riecke (MrBeast), Joe White, Napsio (Vitruvian Studio), Nila122.
License: CC-BY-SA 3.0, OGA-BY 3.0, GPL 2.0 / 3.0 · Derived sprites are shared alike.
github.com/LiberatedPixelCup/Universal-LPC-Spritesheet-Character-Generator
Item & UI icons
Pixel RPG icons by Allexio.
License: CC0 (public domain).
Background art
Sunny Land forest by Ansimuz.
License: MIT.
Sound
Effects synthesized in-engine with ZzFX by Frank Force.
License: MIT.

⚠ Reset progress

This erases everything: gold, level, stage, gear, pack and chests.
There is no undo.
